inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 adjusted operating cash flow $27.5M / ~46.3M shares; official-reports/nr_20260310_Q4_2025.pdf
inputs.normalization_note: Lawrence owner cash uses adjusted operating cash flow, not attributable royalty revenue ($1.51/sh) or GAAP net earnings ($6.45/sh incl. Arthur Gold gain).

optionality_gate.notes: Dividend $0.40/yr at $59.91 = 0.67% yield; adj. op. cash flow yield ~1.0%. Project Generation public stakes ~$49M (~$1.06/sh) plus GBR development options not in Lawrence FCF0.

gaap_vs_fair_value.note: Royalty intangibles on balance sheet; economic value driven by commodity-linked cash flows and JV stakes rather than historical cost.

segments_or_options.label: Project Generation listed portfolio
segments_or_options.notes: $49M / 46.3M sh; marks move with venture market

segments_or_options.label: GBR (29%) development pipeline
segments_or_options.notes: Q4 2025 JV impairment on development portfolio; base overlay $0 until filing marks [Assumption]

segments_or_options.label: Non-producing royalty backlog
segments_or_options.notes: Zero in Lawrence base; copper/potash price optionality via stream/royalty ramp [Assumption]

not_in_model_requires_refresh: MD&A PDF not yet in folder (Vicki/SEDAR)
Fair-value marks on full Project Generation + GBR development book

bear.notes: Commodity mean reversion; cumulative owner cash + terminal re-rate below price; bear IRR via yield_curve overlay (~-20%/yr)

base.notes: Renewables + copper stream growth; potash mid-cycle; exit 18x year-7 cash flow

lines.label: PV of growing owner cash (Lawrence base path)
lines.math: 7yr DCF at base growth implies below-market payoff vs price

sotp_build.notes: Economic NAV below price at base commodity path; bull adds royalty rerate

bull.notes: Copper/potash up-cycle + ARR portfolio doubling; adj. op. cash flow >$1.00/sh by year 7

base.assumption: Starting free cash flow per share

base.source: [Assumption] renewables ramp + copper stream; partial offset lower IOC dividends

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Royalties carried at cost/amortization; Project Generation equities marked to market in disclosures

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / dormant royalty?
option_scan.evidence: AIF producing vs development royalty tables; GBR pipeline

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: GBR JV loss incl. development impairment Q4 2025 NR

option_scan.question: Backlog not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: Renewable royalty revenue grew to $13.4M FY2025 vs $7.0M FY2024

option_scan.question: Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: $49M listed Project Generation portfolio per Q4 NR

option_scan.question: Transitory legal recovery?
option_scan.evidence: Arthur Gold sale gain is one-time; excluded from owner cash

option_scan.question: Embedded product option?
option_scan.evidence: Copper stream deliveries in FY2025 attributable revenue

items: Confirm CAD price vs OTC ATUSF for US holders
Add MD&A + financial statements PDF when SEDAR scrape available
HK Q3 2025 scarcity thesis is context only (not approved third party)

growth_explanation.mechanism: Attributable royalty revenue +9% YoY on potash/base metals/copper stream/renewables; Lawrence path uses adj. operating cash flow growth not headline royalty revenue.

paths.label: Segment-derived growth (pre-falsifier)
paths.weight_why: Segment blend before falsifier pass; diagnostic only when it differs from falsifier-adjusted.
weight_falsifiers: Included at full weight alongside falsifier-adjusted without divergence note

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

qualitative_adjustments.factor: No dated predictive attribute at spot
qualitative_adjustments.rationale: Scarcity is descriptive; no timed mispricing catalyst in base
qualitative_adjustments.falsifier: Cross-check names dated catalyst with timeline

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative

context_overlay.disclaimer: Context only. Tailwinds inform stance and overlay sizing; they do not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion to base case requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

lens_consensus.disclaimer: Advisory lens blend only. Does not replace Lawrence total-synthesis stance gate without [HUMAN REVIEW].

total_return_panel.error: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.
total_return_panel.return_contract: split-adjusted close excluding dividends; event amounts normalized for later splits; cash reinvested at ex-date close; pre-tax nominal

coverage.note: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.
